title: cyanus variegatus
intro: Cyanus variegatus, also known as Cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cornflower typically involve infusions of the flowers and leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
